---
title: "Youbin He"
image: images/HYB_2026.png
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 12em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: youbinhe0607@gmail.com
      href: mailto:youbinhe0607@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/HeYoubin
    - icon: book
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-r5foIsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN
    - icon: fingerprint
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-8018-0909
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/youbin-he-610735308/
    - icon: file-earmark-person
      text: CV
      href: Youbin_He_CV.pdf
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I am a <span class="highlight-primary">Remote Sensing Algorithm Engineer</span> at XINGTUZHIHUI (XI'AN) DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD in Chengdu, China, and a <span class="highlight-primary">prospective M.S./Ph.D. applicant</span> in <span class="highlight-secondary">GeoAI</span>, <span class="highlight-secondary">AI for Remote Sensing</span>, <span class="highlight-secondary">Ecological Remote Sensing</span>, and <span class="highlight-secondary">Wildfire Risk Modeling</span>. My work connects geospatial machine learning, multi-source satellite data processing, and operational remote sensing product generation. I have research experience in wildfire driving factor modeling, ecological environment assessment, land-use change analysis, and remote sensing scene classification. I am especially interested in using spatial machine learning and explainable AI methods, including <span class="highlight-secondary">XGBoost</span>, <span class="highlight-secondary">SHAP</span>, and <span class="highlight-secondary">GeoShapley</span>, to understand nonlinear and spatially heterogeneous environmental processes. I hope to contribute to research groups working on GeoAI, fire ecology, ecological monitoring, and reliable remote sensing systems for environmental decision support.

## Current Position

<span class="highlight-primary">Remote Sensing Algorithm Engineer</span><br>
XINGTUZHIHUI (XI'AN) DIGITAL TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD<br>
Chengdu, China

## Education

B.S. in Geographic Information Science<br>
Shandong Jiaotong University<br>
<span class="highlight-primary">GPA 89.6 / 100, Top 3%</span>

## Application Focus

I am seeking <span class="highlight-primary">M.S. and Ph.D. opportunities</span> in <span class="highlight-secondary">GeoAI</span>, <span class="highlight-secondary">AI for Remote Sensing</span>, <span class="highlight-secondary">Ecological Remote Sensing</span>, and <span class="highlight-secondary">Wildfire Risk Modeling</span>.

## Research Interests

- GeoAI and AI for Remote Sensing
- Wildfire risk modeling and fire ecology
- Multi-source satellite data analysis
- Spatial machine learning and explainable AI
- Ecological environment monitoring
- Operational remote sensing systems

## Selected Highlights

- <span class="highlight-primary">GPA 89.6 / 100, Top 3%</span>.
- One manuscript on grassland and forest fire driving factors in Southwest China is <span class="status-tag">under review</span>.
- <span class="highlight-primary">First-author</span> and co-author publications in IEEE and SPIE conference proceedings.
- Research and engineering experience in multi-source satellite data processing, wildfire monitoring, agricultural monitoring, and remote sensing product generation.
- Awards including National Encouragement Scholarship, Comprehensive First-Class Scholarship, Esri-Cup awards, and Remote Sensing Technology Competition awards.

## Beyond Research

Beyond my academic and engineering work, I enjoy using images and food
as a quieter way to record places, seasons, and everyday observation.
This section will grow into a personal showcase for food works and
photography when I finish organizing a public image set.

::: {.showcase-grid}
::: {.showcase-tile}
### Food Studio

Homemade dishes, plating experiments, and regional flavors that reflect
my curiosity about craft, texture, and daily life.
:::

::: {.showcase-tile}
### Photography Notes

Landscape, city, campus, and fieldwork moments captured through the same
habit of close observation that also shapes my remote sensing work.
:::
:::

## Visitor Map

### Hello, World!

Thanks for stopping by. Visitors from universities, research groups, and
geospatial communities are warmly welcome. If you are interested in
GeoAI, ecological remote sensing, wildfire research, or simply want to
connect, please feel free to reach out.

::: {.visitor-map-panel}
::: {.visitor-map-visual aria-label="Stylized visitor map preview"}
<span class="map-dot map-dot-1"></span>
<span class="map-dot map-dot-2"></span>
<span class="map-dot map-dot-3"></span>
<span class="map-dot map-dot-4"></span>
<span class="map-dot map-dot-5"></span>
:::

Visitor locations can be connected to a live map widget after a public
tracking provider is configured.
:::

::: {.last-updated}
Last updated: June 2026
:::

## Contact

- Email: [youbinhe0607@gmail.com](mailto:youbinhe0607@gmail.com)
- GitHub: <https://github.com/HeYoubin>
- Google Scholar: <https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=-r5foIsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN>
- ORCID: <https://orcid.org/0009-0004-8018-0909>
- LinkedIn: <https://www.linkedin.com/in/youbin-he-610735308/>

:::
